summary: Cash Lock UI Fix Verified - All tests passed. Backend API now returns outflow_count field for backward compatibility, and UI renders correctly.
passed_tests: test_01_cash_lock_api_returns_outflow_count - outflow_count field present in API response
UI Test: Cash Lock section renders with data-testid='lock-status-section'
UI Test: Total Received shows ₹30,000 (2 receipts)
UI Test: Commitments shows ₹0 (0 outflows + 0 ERs)
UI Test: Safe to Use shows ₹4,500
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test project proj_0a79eb51
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash Lock UI fix verified. The issue was a field name mismatch - frontend expected 'outflow_count' but backend was returning 'execution_invoice_count'. Fix applied: backend now returns both fields as aliases. Test project proj_0a79eb51 (TEST_Execute Lead) has signoff_locked=true, total_received=30000, safe_to_use=4500. Cash Lock section renders correctly showing all 4 metrics: Total Received, Locked, Commitments (with outflows count), and Safe to Use.

verified_fix.issue: Cash Lock UI disappeared after financial baseline patch
verified_fix.root_cause: Field name mismatch - frontend expected 'outflow_count' but backend returned 'execution_invoice_count'
verified_fix.fix_applied: Added backward compatibility aliases in backend response (lines 25558-25559 in server.py)
